_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of key cyber threat actors and their equities.
reference_document_element_description: Conduct threat model assessments for AI systems, identifying AI-specific attack surfaces, threat actors, and applicable mitigating controls.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI RM domain. RM-T-002 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: RM-K-005 (RM, cosine: 0.494), RM-S-002 (RM, cosine: 0.476).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.8/10 (raw 0.477). Shared vocabulary: [actors, threat]. DCWF-only terms [cyber, equities, key, knowledge] vs WIDAI-only terms [ai, applicable, assessments, attack, conduct, controls] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.879 (P=0.884, R=0.874). Balanced P/R — the 9-word DCWF element and 17-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.7%). "Knowledge of key cyber threat actors and their equities." and "Conduct threat model assessments for AI systems, identifying AI-specific attack" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.531 > STS 0.477 (gap +0.053). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [actors, threat] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 13.6%. Shared tokens: [actors, threat]. DCWF-only: [cyber, equities, key, knowledge]. WIDAI-only: [ai, applicable, assessments, attack, conduct, controls].
